summary: Iteration 64: AI Workflow Builder fully functional with LLM balance topped up. All features tested and working: visa-categories returns AI-enriched data with subclass numbers/fees/URLs, generate creates comprehensive workflows with 5-7 steps and 10-20 docs, review view is fully editable, save as product works correctly.

minor.issue: Intermittent 500 error 'AI returned invalid workflow format' for specific visa types like 'Subclass 189 - Skilled Independent'. Works fine with simpler service_type like 'PR'.

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Canada_PR_Workflow product via Save as Product
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 64 verified AI Workflow Builder with LLM balance topped up. All flows working: (1) POST /api/ai-workflow/visa-categories returns AI-enriched data - Australia shows 10-12 subclasses with fees (AUD $150-$4,910) and official URLs, Canada shows 10 categories with CAD fees. (2) POST /api/ai-workflow/generate creates comprehensive workflows - Australia PR has 7 steps with 16 docs, Canada Visitor has 6 steps with 13 docs. (3) Workflows include government_fees per step, success_tips (3), common_rejection_reasons (3). (4) Review view is fully editable - product name, description, fees, steps, documents all editable. (5) Save as Product works - creates product with all steps and documents.

visa_categories_australia.details: Returns 10-12 AI-enriched visa subclasses with fees (AUD $150-$4,910) and official URLs

visa_categories_canada.details: Returns 10 visa categories with CAD fees ($100-$2,075)

generate_australia_pr.details: Returns workflow with 7 steps, 16 docs, government fees, tips, rejection reasons

workflow_has_government_fees.details: Both top-level estimated_government_fees and per-step government_fees present

workflow_has_success_tips.details: 3 success tips included in generated workflows

ui_gallery_view.details: 51 country cards with flags, 8 verified templates displayed

ui_visa_categories_australia.details: 12 visa cards with subclass numbers, fees in AUD, category badges, official source links

ui_visa_categories_canada.details: 10 visa cards with fees in CAD, category badges

ui_review_editable_steps.details: Step names, descriptions, duration, documents all editable

ui_save_as_product.details: Save button works, shows success view with 'Workflow Saved!' message
